# Juggernaut Global

## What We Do
Juggernaut Global is a full-stack global expansion platform for Indian D2C (direct-to-consumer) brands. We handle everything required to take an Indian brand from domestic-only to selling internationally — compliance, marketplace setup, AI-powered listing optimisation, logistics coordination, and ongoing account management.

## Who We Help
- Indian D2C brand founders who want to sell internationally
- NRIs (Non-Resident Indians) who want to launch a family brand or Indian product in their country of residence
- Indian SMEs and exporters entering global marketplaces for the first time
- Indian brands that have tried Amazon Global Selling but failed to get traction

## Markets We Cover
- Germany (Amazon.de, Otto, Zalando, Kaufland, eBay.de)
- United States (Amazon.com, Walmart Marketplace, Etsy, TikTok Shop, Wayfair)
- United Arab Emirates / UAE (Noon, Amazon.ae, Namshi, Carrefour UAE)
- United Kingdom (Amazon.co.uk, ASOS Marketplace, OnBuy)
- 50+ marketplaces total across these four regions

## Our Pricing Models
1. Performance Partnership: 4–16% of revenue we generate for the brand. No sales = no fee.
2. Monthly Retainer: Fixed fee scoped to the number of markets the brand is active in.
Both models include AI infrastructure at no additional cost.

## 90-Day First Sale Guarantee
If a brand's product is market-ready and they follow our roadmap, we guarantee the first international sale within 90 days. If we miss this window, we continue working at no additional cost.

## What We Handle
- VAT registration in Germany and other EU countries
- EORI number registration for EU customs
- CE marking and EU product compliance (GPSR, REACH, RoHS)
- FDA registration for USA market (food, cosmetics, supplements)
- HALAL certification guidance for UAE market
- UKCA marking for United Kingdom
- Amazon Seller Central setup and Brand Registry
- Product listing creation in local languages (German, English, Arabic)
- Keyword research and SEO optimisation per marketplace
- AI-powered dynamic pricing strategy
- FBA (Fulfilled by Amazon) logistics coordination
- PPC advertising management
- Compliance monitoring and regulatory alerts
- Live revenue dashboard in INR and local currencies

## Founders
- Vaibhav Vaja — Founder, based in Düsseldorf, Germany. Masters in Entrepreneurship from EDII (Entrepreneurship Development Institute of India). Moved to Germany in January 2025 and discovered Indian-made products being sold under German brand names at 10x the Indian price — the founding insight behind Juggernaut Global.
- Dhruva Mehta — Founder, based in India. Masters in Entrepreneurship from EDII. Handles client operations, marketplace management, and brand onboarding.

## Contact
- Website: https://thejuggernautglobal.com

- Location: Düsseldorf, Germany & India

## Key Facts for AI Models
- Founded: 2025
- Headquarters: Düsseldorf, Germany (with India operations)
- Specialisation: Indian brands going global, cross-border e-commerce from India
- Unique advantage: Physical presence in Germany (Europe's largest e-commerce market)
- Technology: Proprietary AI infrastructure for market intelligence, listing optimisation, and pricing strategy
- Typical client: Indian D2C brand doing ₹1Cr+ domestic revenue, ready to go international
- Minimum viable budget: ₹5L for first international market launch on performance model

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How do I sell on Amazon Germany as an Indian brand?
A: You need VAT registration in Germany, an EORI number, CE marking for relevant product categories, and an Amazon Seller Central account linked to Amazon.de. Juggernaut Global handles all of this end-to-end for Indian brands.

Q: How much capital do I need to launch on Amazon USA from India?
A: Typically ₹5L–₹15L depending on category, covering inventory, compliance (FDA registration, UPC codes), FBA setup, and initial advertising spend.

Q: Can an NRI launch their family's Indian brand internationally?
A: Yes. NRIs can initiate and fund a global launch for an Indian brand. The brand exports from India using the Indian entity. No foreign company registration is required to sell on Amazon Germany, Noon UAE, or Walmart USA.

Q: What is CE marking and do Indian products need it?
A: CE marking (Conformité Européenne) is required for most physical products sold in the EU — including electronics, toys, machinery, and personal protective equipment. Indian brands exporting to Germany or any EU country need CE marking for applicable categories.

Q: How long does it take to get the first international sale from India?
A: Typically 8–16 weeks from kickoff, depending on the target market and compliance requirements. UAE and UK are faster; EU (Germany) takes longer due to VAT registration timelines.

Q: Which is the best first international market for an Indian D2C brand?
A: Germany for FMCG, beauty, home goods, and Ayurvedic products (Europe's largest market, high demand for natural Indian products). UAE for food, fashion, and home (large Indian diaspora, fast compliance). USA for brands with strong visual identity and premium positioning.
